name: polygon
description: Stock market price history, daily open/close, previous close, and ticker reference data from the Polygon.io (Massive) market data API

envVars.name: POLYGON_API_KEY
envVars.description: API key from the Massive (formerly Polygon.io) dashboard, sent as an Authorization: Bearer header

tools.name: Get Aggregate Bars
tools.description: Get OHLCV aggregate bars (candles) for a stock ticker over a custom date range and time window

stocksTicker.description: Case-sensitive stock ticker symbol, e.g. AAPL

multiplier.description: Size of the timespan multiplier, e.g. 1 with timespan 'day' for daily bars

timespan.description: Size of the time window: second, minute, hour, day, week, month, quarter, or year

from.description: Start of the range, as YYYY-MM-DD or a millisecond timestamp

to.description: End of the range, as YYYY-MM-DD or a millisecond timestamp

adjusted.description: Whether results are adjusted for stock splits

sort.description: Sort bars by timestamp: asc or desc

limit.description: Maximum number of base aggregates used to create the results (max 50000)

historicalSummary.omitted: per-bar transaction counts and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Previous Close
tools.description: Get the previous trading day's open, high, low, close, and volume for a stock ticker

stocksTicker.description: Case-sensitive stock ticker symbol, e.g. AAPL

adjusted.description: Whether results are adjusted for stock splits

tools.name: Get Daily Open/Close
tools.description: Get the open, close, high, low, volume, and pre-market/after-hours prices for a stock ticker on a specific date

stocksTicker.description: Case-sensitive stock ticker symbol, e.g. AAPL

adjusted.description: Whether results are adjusted for stock splits

tools.name: Search Tickers
tools.description: Search and list ticker symbols across stocks, indices, forex, and crypto reference data

search.description: Search ticker symbols and company names, e.g. 'apple'

ticker.description: Return only this exact ticker symbol

market.description: Filter by market: stocks, crypto, fx, otc, or indices

type.description: Filter by asset type code, e.g. CS (common stock), ETF

active.description: Only return tickers actively traded as of the request

historicalSummary.omitted: identifiers such as CIK and FIGI codes and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Ticker Details
tools.description: Get reference details for a single ticker: company name, market, exchange, market cap, description, and identifiers

date.description: Point-in-time date (YYYY-MM-DD) for historical ticker information

tools.name: Get Market Status
tools.description: Get the current trading status of US exchanges and market-wide sessions (open, closed, early hours, after hours) — a cheap check before quoting prices

tools.name: Get Ticker News
tools.description: Get recent news articles for a ticker, including publisher, summary, and per-ticker sentiment insights

ticker.description: Case-sensitive ticker symbol to fetch news for, e.g. AAPL

published_utc.gte.description: Only articles published at or after this date/time (YYYY-MM-DD or ISO 8601)

published_utc.lte.description: Only articles published at or before this date/time (YYYY-MM-DD or ISO 8601)

order.description: Sort order by published_utc: asc or desc

prompts.title: Price history
prompts.prompt: Get daily price bars for a ticker I provide over the last month using Polygon.io and summarize the trend.

prompts.title: Previous close
prompts.prompt: Look up the previous trading day's open, high, low, and close for a ticker I provide.

prompts.title: Find a ticker
prompts.prompt: Search Polygon.io reference data for a company name I provide and show the matching ticker symbols with their exchanges.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Polygon.io setup

steps.title: Create an account
steps.description: Sign up at https://massive.com (Polygon.io is now Massive). The free Basic plan works for testing: it includes end-of-day stock data, 2 years of history, and 5 API calls per minute.

steps.title: Copy your API key
steps.description: Open https://massive.com/dashboard/keys and copy the API key shown for your account. Existing Polygon.io keys keep working.

steps.title: Store the key
steps.description: Set the key as POLYGON_API_KEY. It is sent as an Authorization: Bearer header on every request.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Call the Get Previous Close tool with a ticker like AAPL. A 401 means the key is invalid; a 429 means you hit the 5 requests/minute limit on the free plan.

notes: Polygon.io was renamed to Massive in October 2025; api.polygon.io and api.massive.com run in parallel and accept the same keys, so this connector's api.polygon.io endpoints continue to work.
All five tools are available on the free Basic plan; data recency depends on your plan (end-of-day on Basic, 15-minute delayed on Starter/Developer, real-time on Advanced).
The free Basic plan is limited to 5 API calls per minute; exceeding it returns HTTP 429.
